authority: DM-only validation manifest for the canonical Elyndria map

map.visual_audit_note: The map visibly contains eighteen gray dead-zone patches. Its legend intentionally reports the ten known zones as accepted in-world knowledge.

zones.position: Central-west Western Mountains around Deepanvil and its mines.
Southeast of Lake Aelorin, west of Lirael and south of Faerindel.
North-central interior between the northern dwarven belt and upper elven forests.
Northeastern interior east of Ironpeak and north of the upper Ravensport approaches.
East-southeast interior, southwest of Ravensport and north of Havenport.
Far southeastern lowlands west of Havenport.
South-central wetlands between Newbridge, Borderwatch, and southeastern routes.
Southwestern interior north of Unityport and east of Hammerfall.
Northwestern foothills west of Copperhold and southeast of Stonefist.
North-central forest southeast of Silvandar and northwest of Faerindel.
Northeastern forest east of Thalorien and north of Eldergrove.
Eastern riverlands east of Eldergrove and west-northwest of Ravensport.
Southwest-central forest between Moonshadow, Eloweth, and Lirael.
Western interior east of Stonewatch and west of Eloweth.
Central-southern forest east of Lirael and west of Arvandor.
South-central plains southeast of Dawnspire and north of Newbridge.
